Appellant Geri Green'S Demurrer And Motion To Strike Complaint And Dlse Decision
Off Calendar Jan-23-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPELLANT GERI GREEN'S DEMURRER AND MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT AND DLSE DECISION.
Appearances: Anne Hipshman of the Department of Industrial Relations (703.4863) for respondent and opposing party; no other appearances.
The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: the purported demurrer is overruled and purported motion to strike is denied. Neither a demurrer nor a motion to strike is cognizable in a case such as this. Order signed. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported

Appellant Geri Green'S Motion To Stay Posting Of Bond Undertaking Under Labor Code Section 98.2
Off Calendar Jan-23-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPELLANT GERI GREEN'S MOTION TO STAY POSTING OF BOND UNDERTAKING UNDER LABOR CODE SECTION 98.2.
Appearances: Anne Hipshman of the Department of Industrial Relations (703.4863) for respondent and opposing party; no other appearances.
The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: denied. Defendant is required to post an undertaking in the amount of the order, decision or award, which includes amounts that defendant asserts were awarded in excess of jurisdiction. Order signed. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported
